news.title: Capsitech It Services Private Limited Company Profile - India
news.summary:
Capsitech It Services Private Limited is an enterprise located in India, with the main office in Jodhpur.
The company operates in the Other Computer Related Services sector.
There are currently 374 (2025) people employed by Capsitech It Services Private Limited.
From the latest financial highlights, Capsitech It Services Private Limited reported a net sales revenue increase of 22.75% in 2025.
The net profit margin of Capsitech It Services Private Limited decreased by 0.06% in 2025.

news.title: Capsitech it services private limited
news.summary:
CAPSITECH IT SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED is a 11.9 Years old company, incorporated on 16 Aug 2014.
Its authorized share capital is ₹9,00,000.00 ( ₹9.00 Lakhs ) and its paid up capital is ₹2,00,000.00 ( ₹2.00 Lakhs ) As per MCA the main line of business is Computer And Related Activities.
CAPSITECH IT SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED's Annual General Meeting (AGM) was last held on 30 Sep 2025 and as per records from Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA), its balance sheet was last filed on 31 Mar 2025.
CAPSITECH IT SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED's unique Corporate Identification Number (CIN) is U72900RJ2014PTC046083 and its registration number is 46083.
The registered address of CAPSITECH IT SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED is H 298-299 3RD PHASE RIICO INDUSTRIAL AREA BORANADA, NA, JODHPUR, Rajasthan 342012, India.

news.title: Web Development Company in Jodhpur, Rajasthan
news.summary:
Chairman's Address As we embark on a new academic year, Capsitech Institute of Technology stands as a beacon of excellence in imparting industry-oriented technical training to students.
Our commitment to providing advanced knowledge, innovative skills, and a strong ethical foundation ensures the development of leaders in the ever-evolving landscape of technology.
Our students are trained by industry leaders who actively work on several international projects, emphasising experiential learning and the practical implementation of theoretical concepts.
At Capsitech, we provide students with unparalleled opportunities to engage in live projects that enhance their exposure to real-world problem-solving experiences.
Join us at Capsitech Institute of Technology and seize the opportunity to become a leader in the field of technology.

news.title: Software Development Company in Jodhpur
news.summary:
Future Prospects Anticipating the Business Needs We strive to assimilate the needs the business may face in the future, and we intend to develop and effectuate next-generation solutions that may potentially ensure the smooth progression of the business trajectory.
Our expertise lies in comprehending the challenges that are faced by businesses of varied domains and developing potential, futuristic solutions.
Our aspirations of excelling as a one-stop solution to your business requirements are premised upon the idea of ensuring comprehensive growth and development of complementary businesses in different sectors.

ai_insights.summary: Capsitech is a growing IT services and fintech company with a strong presence in Jodhpur, India, and London, UK. The company has shown consistent revenue growth and maintains a workforce of 374 employees. They specialize in developing scalable digital solutions for modern businesses.
